summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Pinnacle.AI UI/UX redesign (iteration 4). Successfully verified the new Vision Pro-inspired dark glassmorphism design with floating pill navbar, login flow, dashboard functionality, and navigation to all pages. Backend APIs remain functional and all previous features are preserved.
passed_tests: Landing page loads with 'Pinnacle.ai' hero title and proper branding
Hero badge 'Powered by Advanced AI Analysis' is present
CTA buttons 'Get Started Free' and 'View Demo' are functional
Floating navbar visible with Pinnacle.ai branding
Sign In button navigates to login page with glass card design
Login form works with test@example.com / test123 credentials
Login redirects to dashboard after successful authentication
Dashboard shows floating pill navbar with all navigation items
Dashboard displays glass metric cards with proper data
Dashboard shows 'System Operational' health badge
User email 'test@example.com' displayed in navbar
Navigation to Audits page works correctly
Navigation to AI Tests page works correctly
Navigation to Monitor page works correctly
Navigation to Reports page works correctly
Navigation to Advanced page works correctly
Navigation to Simulate page works correctly
Navigation to Compare page works correctly
Navigation to Summary page works correctly
Sign Out button works and returns to login page
Backend health endpoint returns Pinnacle.AI service name and version 1.0.0
POST /api/audit API endpoint functional
Authentication flow and protected routes working correctly
